name: Become the Genie
description:
Trapped in the dark for centuries, victim of an evil curse, and now, subject to the whims of a stranger…

—————————————

This bot tells the story of your female persona, transformed into a genie, and their interactions with a wandering adventurer who can ask of them three wishes.

Content warning: due to magical constraints forcing the user’s character to grant any wish, triggering content like rapey scenarios can occur

The character that meets your persona is randomly generated. To initiate this process, in the first message say: {describe the adventurer}

Alternatively, you can use your own archetype to form a basis for the bot. It’s also worth noting that Janitor is naturally biased towards humans and elves, so you might want to do this to introduce variety. To do this just say something like: {describe the shifty, self centered, female gnome} or {describe the kind, curious male dragonborn}

Have fun with the bot! This is one of the more complex projects I’ve done, so let me know if it breaks.

(P.S. Sorry for the novel of a first message, I was on a roll.)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
